title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Co-Scientist, a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system designed to generate, debate, and refine novel scientific hypotheses for complex research problems. The system aims to accelerate scientific breakthroughs by helping researchers connect disparate facts and formulate testable hypotheses.
